P(CPP).description: Probability that the primary reason for diversity training is to comply with personnel policies (CPP).

P(IP).description: Probability that the primary reason for diversity training is to increase productivity (IP).

P(SC).description: Probability that the primary reason for diversity training is to stay competitive (SC).

P(SR).description: Probability that the primary reason for diversity training is social responsibility (SR). Used to define the complementary event NSR.

P(O).description: Probability that the primary reason for diversity training is other (O).
